generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired FEMA coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital civil defense preparedness is for national security. My neighbor's family in Ohio had their emergency supplies ready when that unexpected tornado hit last year - they credit their preparedness for keeping their kids safe. We can't rely on luck alone. Basic preparedness isn't about fear, it's about responsible citizenship. The data shows communities with preparedness programs have 40% fewer casualties during emergencies. Let's make sure our tax dollars support what actually keeps families safe.
